title: Durg to Delhi Heritage Road Trip
plan: Day 1: Start from Durg early and drive toward Gwalior with meal and fuel breaks.
Day 2: Explore Gwalior Fort, Jai Vilas Palace, and Tansen Tomb.
Day 3: Drive to Agra, visit Agra Fort and Mehtab Bagh.
Day 4: Visit Taj Mahal at sunrise, then drive to Delhi.
Day 5: Explore Old Delhi, India Gate, Qutub Minar, and local markets.
budgetHint: Mid-range estimate: 2500-4500 INR per person per day excluding fuel and intercity vehicle cost.

title: Budget Goa Beach Break
plan: Day 1: Arrive, check in, and enjoy a relaxed beach evening.
Day 2: Explore North Goa beaches, Fort Aguada, and cafes.
Day 3: Visit South Goa beaches or Dudhsagar Falls depending on season.
Day 4: Local shopping, food stops, and departure.
budgetHint: Budget estimate: 2500-4000 INR per person per day with basic stays and local food.
